name: Ettore Bastico
longDesc: Ettore Bastico est gouverneur général de Libye et supérieur nominal de Rommel en 1941-1943, surnommé « Bombastico » par les Allemands. Carte WC4 blindée A argent à profil désert : second slot italien derrière Graziani.

skills.name: Retaliation
skills.desc: When friendly troops within 1 grid around you are killed in battle, you will gain the Vengeance status, with attack +18 for 2 turns.

skills.name: Armored Assault
skills.desc: Deal +18% damage to the enemy when commanding armored units

skills.name: Panzer Leader
skills.desc: 16% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding armored units

skills.name: Emplacement libre
skills.desc: Compétence apprenable — à remplir via l'Académie.

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Ettore Bastico was Governor-General of Libya and Rommel's nominal superior in 1941–43, nicknamed 'Bombastico' by the Germans. A WC4 silver-A armor card with a desert profile — Italy's second slot behind Graziani.
longDescDe: Ettore Bastico war 1941–43 Generalgouverneur von Libyen und nomineller Vorgesetzter Rommels, von den Deutschen „Bombastico“ genannt. Im WC4 eine Silber-A-Panzerkarte mit Wüstenprofil — Italiens zweiter Slot hinter Graziani.
